message.content:
@startuml
title Login Sequence GET

participant "customer" as C
participant "Tomcat" as T

rectangle "entries (UI)" {
    participant "Index" as I
    participant "BaseServlet" as B
    participant "index.jsp" as J1
    participant "Login" as L
    participant "login.jsp" as J2
}

C --> T : 1 GET /
T --> I : 2 doGet()
I --> B : 3 render()
B --> J1 : 4 forward()
J1 --> L : 5 doGet()
L --> B : 6 render()
B --> J2 : 7 forward()
J2 --> C : 8 result

@enduml
